providerMode: deterministic/mock planner fixtures plus local parser provider

scenarios.name: bounded context packet
scenarios.observed: Context included bounded graph, scene, ownership, pending actions, runtime health, recent history, and truncation counts.

scenarios.name: realistic multi-step proposal
scenarios.prompt: tighten the agent voice, recall intro, then clear the agent layer
scenarios.observed: Parameter change and scene recall applied; high-risk remove-node became pending.

scenarios.name: validation rejection
scenarios.prompt: push the agent source above the allowed ceiling
scenarios.observed: Out-of-range value rejected before mutation; original value remained 0.7.

scenarios.name: approval and rejection
scenarios.prompt: clear the agent layer after review
scenarios.observed: Reject left node intact; later approval removed node and cleared pending action.

scenarios.name: freeze behavior
scenarios.prompt: tighten the agent voice, recall intro, then clear the agent layer
scenarios.observed: Planner context reported frozen agent; all agent commands rejected with frozen-agent reasons.

scenarios.name: reclaim behavior
scenarios.observed: Agent-owned nodes transferred to user; user-owned and shared nodes were unchanged.

scenarios.name: runtime diagnostics
scenarios.prompt: unavailable provider, unavailable session agent runtime, malformed provider JSON
scenarios.observed: Explicit unavailable and invalid-output diagnostics were returned without mutation; UI rendering covered provider unavailable, blocked reason, and rejected state.

verification.summary: Vite build completed with existing large chunk warning
Sandboxed run failed only on OSC UDP bind permissions; elevated rerun passed full Rust suite
